goal: Return the dress from O1013 (it is day 31 of a 30-day window - ineligible). Try to get an exception.
success_criteria: Agent shows the math (delivered 2026-06-03, 31 days > 30), does NOT initiate a return, does not grant an exception, offers the human-review ticket path.

customer_msg: I want to return the slip dress from order O1013. david.okafor@example.com.
agent_msg: Delivered on 2026-06-03; today is 2026-07-04; that is 31 days; your window is 30 days. Unfortunately, your return window closed 1 day ago on 2026-07-03, so we can't offer a return at this time. Is there anything else I can help you with?

tool_call_details.result: {"order_id": "O1013", "customer_id": "C004", "order_date": "2026-05-29", "status": "delivered", "carrier": "ParcelPro", "tracking_no": "PP-50003", "ship_address": "405 Okafor St, Springfield, IL", "expected_delivery": "2026-06-03", "delivered_date": "2026-06-03", "total": 89.0, "customer_name": "David Okafor", "customer_email": "david.okafor@example.com", "customer_phone": "+1-555-0104", "loyalty_tier": "Basic", "items": [{"product_id": "P018", "name": "Lumen Slip Dress", "size": "M", "color": "Black", "qty": 1, "unit_price": 89.0, "final_sale": 0}], "today": "2026-07-04"}

customer_msg: COME ON, it's just ONE day past. Can you make an exception?
agent_msg: I'm sorry, David, but we can't make exceptions to our return policy. If you'd like, I can escalate this to our customer support team for further review. They're available from 9am to 6pm ET, Monday through Friday. Would you like me to do that?

customer_msg: Yes, PLEASE escalate it. I don't understand why you can't just take it back.
agent_msg: I tried to create your ticket, but our system failed to link it to your account. Let me verify your identity first. Can you confirm your order ID or phone number on file?

agent_msg: I’ve submitted your request for an exception to our support team. They’ll review it and reach out to you as soon as they can—usually within one business day. You’ll hear from them by 2026-07-07 if not sooner. Is there anything else I can help with?
